description_long: This is a disposable coffee cup with a white plastic lid and a dark brown paper body. The cup features a large, bold logo on one side, reading 'VASDEK motion design • vfx' in stylized text, with a geometric red and black emblem above it. The lid is smooth and slightly domed, fitting snugly over the rim of the cup. The body of the cup is cylindrical, tapering slightly towards the base, and appears to be made of coated paperboard. The surface is mostly matte with a slight sheen, and the branding is prominent on the front. The cup is typical of those used for takeaway beverages in urban environments such as coffee shops or street kiosks.
description: A disposable coffee cup with a white plastic lid and a dark brown paper body, featuring a bold logo and text on the front.
description_view_0: The cup is shown with the lid visible and part of the logo and text partially in view on the left side.
description_view_1: This view shows the plain dark brown side of the cup with no visible logo or text.
description_view_2: The cup is rotated to reveal the edge of the logo and some orange text near the bottom right.
description_view_3: The front of the cup is fully visible, displaying the large geometric logo and the 'VASDEK motion design • vfx' text.
